overview: This Legacy Merfolk deck leverages blue's speed and card selection to establish early board presence and maintain tempo. Aether Vial enables aggressive early plays, while Lord of Atlantis provides consistent token generation and board control. Vodalian Hexcatcher ensures long-term card advantage by cycling through the deck and protecting key threats.
win_conditions: Establishing an early board with low-cost Merfolk
Generating overwhelming token advantage with Lord of Atlantis
Maintaining card advantage and threat protection via Vodalian Hexcatcher

keep_criteria: Hands with Aether Vial and early Merfolk
Hands containing Lord of Atlantis or Vodalian Hexcatcher with lands
Hands with multiple low-cost threats and interaction
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking lands or early plays
Hands missing interaction or board presence

early_game: Prioritize casting Aether Vial to enable early Merfolk
Play low-cost threats to apply immediate pressure
Hold interaction for opponent's early threats
mid_game: Cast Lord of Atlantis to generate tokens and stabilize
Use Vodalian Hexcatcher to draw cards and protect the board
Maintain board presence while cycling through the deck
late_game: Leverage token generation to overwhelm opponent's removal
Use card advantage to outlast control strategies
Close out games with relentless board pressure

key_cards.name: Lord of Atlantis
key_cards.notes: Cast when you have mana to generate tokens, using them to block, attack, or sacrifice for value. Prioritize keeping it protected with counterspells.

key_cards.name: Aether Vial
key_cards.role: Early game acceleration and threat deployment
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to enable a Merfolk on turn two. Use its ability to untap and cast threats early, then transition to a mana rock in later turns.

key_cards.name: Vodalian Hexcatcher
key_cards.notes: Cast to draw a card and gain hexproof from a color. Use it to protect key threats from removal while cycling through your deck for answers.

sequencing_tips: Hold up counterspells for opponent's early threats before committing to the board
Sequence Aether Vial plays to maximize early pressure without stalling
Prioritize casting Vodalian Hexcatcher when opponent has removal in hand
Use Lord of Atlantis tokens to absorb removal before committing larger threats

matchups.advice: Play aggressively early to prevent them from stabilizing. Use Vodalian Hexcatcher to protect key threats from removal.
Stall early with interaction and Aether Vial untaps. Prioritize Lord of Atlantis for token generation to outpace their damage.
Disrupt their early turns with interaction. Keep hands with multiple spells and prioritize finding disruption quickly.
